overall.description: A cinematic ascending drone shot from the video game Cyberpunk 2077, moving up the exterior of a futuristic glass skyscraper from street canyon level to rooftop height. The clip showcases the transition from neon-lit street canyons to panoramic cityscape views with high-fidelity ray-traced lighting and detailed cyberpunk architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: vertical ascent through neon-lit street canyon

agents.ego_description: smoothly ascending the exterior glass facade of a skyscraper overlooking the street canyon below

entered.detail: reflective teal-tinted glass panels of the building being ascended
large illuminated commercial advertisements including 'SCOO' signage
elevated train track running parallel to the street canyon
multi-lane road intersection visible far below with tiny vehicles

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a high-angle view looking down a cyberpunk street canyon. The camera ascends smoothly along a glass skyscraper facade with teal reflective windows, while neon billboards glow on the adjacent building to the right. Below, a street intersection with sparse traffic is visible, and a monorail track runs along the left side of the canyon.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper building terraces transitioning to open skyline

events.description: camera emerges from building shadow into direct bright sunlight
horizon and distant cityscape become visible as camera clears the street canyon

agents.ego_description: continuing vertical ascent while tilting outward to reveal the emerging horizon and upper building architecture

entered.detail: upper architectural levels with balconies and planter boxes
sprawling futuristic metropolis with towering structures in the background

segments.scene_description: As the ascent continues, the camera emerges from the shadow of the buildings into direct sunlight. The neon billboards fall away below while the upper terraces of the skyscraper come into view, featuring architectural details and planters. The horizon opens up revealing the distant cyberpunk cityscape, and the monorail track appears closer on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: rooftop observation deck with panoramic metropolis view

events.description: camera reaches rooftop level and shifts to panoramic view of the city skyline

agents.ego_description: slowing ascent to pan across the panoramic skyline, showcasing the vast cyberpunk cityscape from rooftop height

entered.detail: distant industrial smokestacks and cooling towers on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The final segment reaches the rooftop level with a full view of the open sky. The camera pans across the panoramic cityscape, revealing distant industrial towers and the sprawling metropolis. The glass skyscraper facade now appears on the right side of the frame as the camera looks out over the edge, while the monorail track curves away into the distance on the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous ascending camera movement that transforms a claustrophobic, neon-lit street canyon into a vast, sun-drenched panoramic cityscape. It begins by gliding upward along the teal reflective glass of a skyscraper, looking down upon a street intersection and a monorail track while glowing billboards illuminate the narrow corridor. As the camera climbs, it emerges from the deep shadows of the buildings into direct sunlight, causing the neon lights to fade as architectural terraces and planters come into view. The horizon then opens wide to reveal the sprawling metropolis and distant industrial towers before the camera reaches the rooftop level. Finally, the view expands into a full open sky, panning across the urban expanse as the skyscraper facade shifts to the side and the monorail track curves away into the distance.
